title: Bonsai's Aether Resprite
description: This is just a small resource pack that changes up the textures of the aether mod :D
body:
This is a resource pack that simply changes some assets in the aether mod
currently it almost exclusively changes natural blocks as ive not gotten to other types

## What am i plotting for the future, you may ask?
-stuff such as Compat for Deep Aether and other aether addons

-hopfully mob remodels and textures if i can figure those out

-and for the most part general improvments on my current assets

## Extra notes
This originated as just small retextures i wanted for a personal modpack, so updates might be few and far between >:)
